title: Dakar with Kids: Gorée Island
description: Day trip ideas for Gorée Island, kid-friendly pacing. #dakar #senegal #travel
alt_text: Colorful waterfront houses on Goree Island near Dakar

title: Classic Mafe (Peanut Stew)
description: Senegalese mafe the way Dad made it. Slow simmer, plenty of peanut. #mafe #senegalese #recipe
alt_text: A bowl of mafe peanut stew over rice

title: Thiebou Jenn (Fish & Rice)
description: Senegal's national dish. Uncle Oscar's version with broken rice. #thieboujenn #senegalese
alt_text: A platter of thiebou jenn with vegetables and rice

title: Sunday Pot Roast in the Dutch Oven
description: The standing Sunday pot roast. Low and slow in the enameled Dutch oven. #potroast #sundaydinner
alt_text: A pot roast with carrots and potatoes in a Dutch oven

title: Raised Bed Layout for Small Yards
description: Three raised beds for tomatoes, peppers, okra, and herbs. #raisedbeds #gardening
alt_text: Three wooden raised garden beds in a small backyard

title: Growing Okra in Containers
description: Okra tips for a Baltimore growing season. Dad's plant. #okra #containergarden

title: Dinosaur & Rocket Bedroom Wall
description: Wall ideas for Andrew's dinosaur-and-rockets phase. #kidsroom #dinosaurs

title: Loft Bed with Storage Below
